heading: Considerations
body:
- If you are using the [standard connection string format](manual/reference/connection-string)
  rather than the DNS (Domain Name Service) seedlist format,
  removing an entire zone from an existing global cluster may result
  in a new connection string.

  To verify the correct connection string after deploying the changes:

  # Step 1: Verify the connection string.

  Click Connect.

- When Global Writes are enabled, Global Clusters do not support dedicated search nodes.
